mnemonics: JSON is Just Simple Objects Notation - because it's a lightweight format for storing and transporting data objects
keyPoints: JSON stands for JavaScript Object Notation
Python's json module can parse JSON strings into dictionaries using json.loads()
Python dictionaries can be converted to JSON strings using json.dumps()
commonMistakes: Forgetting to import the json module before using its methods
Confusing json.load() (for files) with json.loads() (for strings)
